overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a dystopian industrial waterfront district at dusk. The player character moves from beneath an overpass with graffiti-covered walls, along a rain-slicked promenade with views of smokestacks and industrial complexes, and under a covered walkway with glowing neon signage.

events.description: exits covered underpass into open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking through underpass area with graffiti walls, approaching open waterfront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking toward camera
pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from camera

massive concrete pillars and overhead bridge structure
black and yellow striped traffic bollards lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with graffiti-covered walls on the left. The player walks forward past striped bollards while pedestrians move through the scene, transitioning from the sheltered underpass toward an open waterfront area.

events.description: transition from covered underpass to open waterfront with industrial views
slight turn to the left while approaching waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking along open waterfront promenade with industrial smokestacks visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall concrete smokestack with red warning lights near the top
metal safety railing along the water's edge
factory buildings with multiple smokestacks emitting smoke

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade with wet concrete surfaces. A massive industrial smokestack with red lights dominates the center background, while factory buildings emit smoke into the hazy dusk sky. The player walks along the railing, leaving the graffiti walls behind.

events.description: game UI notification for Regina Jones appears on left side of screen

agents.ego_description: continuing along waterfront promenade, passing a traffic light pole

entered.detail: large rusted industrial metal framework structure spanning overhead

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the waterfront walkway as dusk settles and artificial lighting becomes more prominent. The industrial smokestack shifts to the left as the camera advances. A game UI notification appears, and a large metal overhead structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with overhead metal beams and neon signage

passing bright cyan and red neon signs illuminating the path with colored light

agents.ego_description: walking under covered structure with neon signs on right side, moon visible ahead through haze

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement display with red demon face and Japanese text
full moon visible through the hazy industrial sky

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath massive rusted metal beams. The environment shifts to neon lighting as bright cyan and red signs illuminate the right side of the path. The full moon becomes visible through the haze ahead, while the industrial smokestack recedes into the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a gritty concrete underpass into a neon-lit industrial waterfront at dusk. It begins beneath a sheltered overpass characterized by graffiti-covered walls and striped bollards, moving past pedestrians toward the open air. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene expands into a wide promenade of wet concrete dominated by a massive, red-lit industrial smokestack emitting smoke into a hazy sky. The view then shifts as the player advances along the railing, causing the smokestack to drift leftward while a large metal overhead structure looms in the distance. Finally, the environment transitions into a covered walkway beneath rusted beams, where the industrial gray gives way to bright cyan and red neon signage under the glow of a hazy full moon.
